form.formComment: Resuming after four months in the paddock. Finished off last preparation won by 1.4 len Toowoomba Mdn-Sw December 13 over 1625m defeating Attack Force carrying 56.5kg at $1.75. When resuming last campaign fifth of 8 at Doomben F&M Mdn-Sw October 8 over 1350m, 3.5 len behind Adelaide Girl with 58kg at $4.40. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after nine months sat on the speed throughout before fading second last of 11 at Ipswich F&M Bm60 on March 20 over 1350m, 13 len behind Ratenotice with 58kg at $26. Previously second-up 6th of 8 at Doomben 2yo Hcp on May 28 over 1200m, slow going 8 len behind Damien carrying 55kg at $101. Strips fitter and is one of the leading chances.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after two months 4th of 8 at Nanango Bm55 on April 4 over 1200m, 7 len behind Grand Crusader with 57kg at $4.
